_description: Insight card for carousel decks. Best for sharing lessons, tips, rules, or principles — one per slide. Supports an optional background image with an automatic dark overlay. Keep bg and ink consistent across all slides; vary only accent for visual interest.

_slots.heading: REQUIRED — the main insight2. 2–8 words. Displayed at 100px bold serif.
_slots.body: optional — supporting explanation. 1–3 sentences. Shown at reduced opacity below the heading.
_slots.footer: optional — bottom-left text. Attribution, handle, or brand name (e.g. '@yourname').
_slots.image: optional — background image. Local path relative to data JSON or a URL. A dark overlay (tinted with bg color at 72% opacity) is applied automatically so text remains legible. Works best with moody, dark, or desaturated photos. When omitted, the slide uses the solid bg color.
_slots.bg: optional — background hex color. Also used as the overlay tint when an image is present. Use the SAME value on every slide in a deck. Default: #0c0b09
_slots.ink: optional — primary text hex color. Use the SAME value on every slide in a deck. Default: #eae6de
_slots.accent: optional — accent hex color for eyebrow and rule. VARY per slide. Default: #d4a054

title: 7 Lessons from Building in Public

slides.heading: Start before you're ready
slides.body: Waiting for the perfect moment is just procrastination wearing a mask. Ship the ugly first version.

slides.heading: Share the process, not just the outcome
slides.body: People connect with struggle and iteration. The messy middle is the interesting part.

slides.heading: Consistency compounds
slides.body: One post won't change anything. Three hundred posts will change everything.

slides.heading: Your audience is smaller than you think
slides.body: And that's fine. Ten people who care beat ten thousand who scroll past.
